prompt: I have 3 worlds on my Paper server: overworld (world_new), nether (world_new_nether), and a creative flatworld. What builder_type and config should I use for each in DHS?

assertions.text: Mentions sample_biomes_3d for nether or render_distance reduction
Provides a reasonable recommendation for the creative flatworld (FullBuilder, FastOverworldBuilder, or None/disable)
